{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122395057DA2367F3650814A29B"}"},"total":119},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561049214132978494","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看的赛朋博克2077同人小说"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760448209,"group_id":"7547695921664904254","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人很懒，什么都没有留下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4ksXdftGbogzAA98BWGv28=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"4502474025","user_name":"妄想也是收费的"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4502474025","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7547695921664904254","book_info":{"abstract":"赛博朋克2076年，夜之城迎来了历史性的重大转折，传说中毁灭世界的邪神降临了！
邪神：“桀桀桀，夜之城的小逼崽子们，从现在起，你们不论高低贵贱全部都是我的奴仆了，我将对你们进行惨无人道的残酷统治！”
“从现在起，你们工作日必须干满8小时才有钱拿！午餐最多只有2小时计入工作时间！
每周必须工作5天！加班费只给3倍！加班时长最多两小时！
吃不起饭的穷逼只准吃本神的邪王套餐！牛肉龙虾快乐水！穷鬼不准吃大米！吃肉一样能吃饱！
生病受伤了都给老子在图腾下蹲一会就会好，想靠生病受伤请假不干活门都没有！
干活满1年才有年假5天！工作满10年才有10天！满20年才有20天！
必须工作到50岁才能退休！死了也会在本神领地复活成18岁，然后继续进行惨无人道的永恒工作！
记住本神尊号——红莲司命净世天尊，谁敢违背本神神谕，就大声喊出吾之圣名，本神必亲手将他吊在路灯上！”
夜之城人：“向红莲司命献上忠诚！为净世天尊献上心脏！吾等虔诚信徒必将为您对抗全世界！”
邪神：“？？？等会，我就统治个夜之城为什么要对抗全世界？”
夜之城忠诚信徒：“这您别管，额啊啊啊啊啊，所有人都过来，世界上只能有一个神，就是吾神，我们联合！让世界熊熊燃烧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f9e6c0f660e9a4d504861394947ff696~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"家里三只猫刻耳柏洛斯","author_id":"","book_id":"7547695921664904254","book_name":"赛博朋克：我的公司双休不加班","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#184078","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2431人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7547696032495190590","read_count":"2431","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"667429"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"303","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,网游,同人,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4b42df5c044c7772b53e31be60f50590~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287990&x-signature=PnRPh9VAJ21GUu7GvPgKYDiFUfQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"697529419695755","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122395057DA2367F3650814A29B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_
